additionalNotes.unfinishedDreams.actual: Building Lorevox. It's the thing I want to last — a system that captures family stories before they disappear.

laterYears.lifeLessons.expected: Time goes faster than you think
laterYears.lifeLessons.actual: That time goes faster than you think. You blink and your kids are grown and your parents are gone.

raw_items.value: We were Germans from Russia. Both sides — the Zarrs and the Schaafs. My grandmother Josie's family, the Schaafs, came from Ukraine. My grandfather Mathias hated the Russians. That whole culture came through in the food and the way things were done.

earlyMemories.significantEvent.actual: uncle August was mean to me

raw_items.value: uncle August was mean to me

military.branch.actual: My great-grandfather John Michael Shong served in the Civil War. Company G of the 28th Infantry, from February 1865 to January 1866. He was stationed in Kansas and Missouri.
